report.summary: Cycle v15: Minor negative drift — TS errors up from 25→42 (new JSX errors in crypto-index-funds page), 4 more untracked files, 2 more orphan slugs. Git locks at 7 days. Zero commits/deploys. Production still on 6-day-old build e999560.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: DELTA SINCE v14: +17 TypeScript errors (25→42). 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (was 25 — recount shows more), 2 NEW in src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped '>' in JSX).
NEW REGRESSION: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx has JSX syntax errors (TS1003, TS1382) — unescaped angle bracket. This page will fail to render if ignoreBuildErrors is ever disabled.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 450 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+2 from v14), 105 missing page.tsx (+2). With page.tsx: 345 (unchanged). New orphan slugs added without corresponding pages.
CRITICAL BUG (carry-over): /learn/unichain-guide-2026 and /learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026 still have 'use client' + metadata conflict.
BUILD: Production build cannot run in sandbox (OOM). ignoreBuildErrors masks TS issues. Live site unreachable from sandbox (egress blocked).
WORKING TREE: 47 modified tracked files (-1), 642 untracked files (+4). Total: 690 uncommitted changes (+4).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 API ROUTES PRESENT: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields. No file changes since last cycle.
CACHE STATUS: 6/6 routes have caching via Cache-Control headers. /api/defi-yields still CDN-only (no in-memory cache).
FALLBACK DATA: 2/6 routes have fallback (prices, market-dominance). 4/6 will error on upstream failure — unchanged.
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 core API routes wired to rate limiter. Only /api/cache-stats and /api/health have rate limiting. Carry-over P1 for 40+ cycles.
LIVE HEALTH: Cannot verify from sandbox (egress blocked to degen0x.com). Production should be serving from e999560 build if Vercel is healthy.
NO DELTA: No API route files modified since last cycle.

sections.title: DevOps
items: GIT LOCKS PERSIST [P0 — 7 DAYS]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) and .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) still present. All git commit/push operations blocked.
LAST COMMIT: e999560 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)' — Mar 17, 6 days ago.
LAST DEPLOY: Same commit e999560. Production running 6-day-old build on Vercel (project: cryptodegen).
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 690 entries (+4 from v14). Local-to-production divergence continues growing each cycle.
PRODUCTION UNREACHABLE FROM SANDBOX: degen0x.com blocked by egress proxy. Cannot verify Vercel deployment health directly.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → stage changes → commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing. Zero commits, zero deploys, zero page promotions.
NEGATIVE DRIFT: +17 TS errors, +2 orphan slugs, +4 untracked files since v14. Quality degrading without intervention.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git lock files must be manually cleared before ANY progress reaches production.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 pages with 'use client'+metadata bug need programmer fix.
NEW ISSUE [P2]: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 has JSX syntax errors — needs fix before ignoreBuildErrors can be disabled.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to any core API route.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 4/6 API routes missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 105 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no matching page.tsx.
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITY: (1) Clear git locks, (2) fix crypto-index-funds JSX, (3) commit + push + deploy.
